{{Quote|Justice is what we all seek.|Porolo Miatamia|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Porolo Miatamia''' was a male [[Diamal]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented the [[Diamal]]a people by [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] and was one of the largest supporters of peace during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].<ref name="SOTP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>

==Biography==
===Caamas Document Crisis===
Porolo Miatamia was the elected senator for the Diamala during the crisis and a political rival of Senator [[Ghic Dx'ono]] of the [[Ishori]]. During the crisis, Miatamia and his [[Porolo Miatamia's aide|aide]] along with Lando Calrissian, who was transporting them from [[Cilpar]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], was captured by the impostor [[Flim (Human)|Flim]] posing as [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].<ref name="SOTP" /> While these were deemed as false by Dx'ono and the rest of the senate while in session, these were proven to be true.

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], he was a member of the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]]. Thus, he was at the presentation by Colonel [[Belindi Kalenda]] concerning the "defection" of [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] and the attack on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
He was an accomplished [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player.<ref name="SOTP" />
